okhttp3util/pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release target to Java 21 to ensure bytecode compatibility with the new JDK version.
okhttp3util/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against the default JDK version (likely 8 or 11), resulting in bytecode incompatible with Java 21 runtime features or failing to utilize Java 21 language features if the source level is also raised.
